_comment: Machine-readable fixture catalog: example -> expected result. Drives the loader smoke test (every referenced path must exist) and the iterate completion summary. key_property is one of the four the adversarial panel checks, or null.

fixtures.name: mini_repo_app
fixtures.example: A spec.md with active + removed FRs and Layers in each provenance state, plus tagged pytest/Playwright/Vitest tests (all four grammar forms) + a malformed tag + an untagged test.
fixtures.expected_result: Parses to the golden manifest: 4 FRs, 1 orphan, 1 invalid_tag, 1 untagged.

fixtures.name: golden_manifest
fixtures.expected_result: Validates against the v2 schema; FR-03.01 e2e=MISSING (skipped), FR-03.09 orphan flagged, all three provenance states present.

fixtures.name: golden_report
fixtures.expected_result: One row per FR with per-layer ok/MISSING/n-a; orphan + invalid + untagged sections.

fixtures.name: evidence_skipped
fixtures.example: Per-test execution evidence incl. a skipped e2e test.
fixtures.expected_result: e2e/auth.spec.ts 'signs in...' => status skipped, executed not_run => coverage MISSING, never ok.

fixtures.name: evidence_raw_reports
fixtures.example: Raw JUnit / Playwright-JSON / Vitest reporter samples keyed to test ids.
fixtures.expected_result: Loadable; the Playwright sample carries the skipped spec; normalize to evidence_index.json.

fixtures.name: diff_removal
fixtures.example: FR-03.03 moved to ## Removed Requirements; its tagged test still exists.

fixtures.name: diff_behavior_change
fixtures.example: FR-03.02 description changed (behavior-change signal); its e2e test present + passing.
fixtures.expected_result: change->cross-layer gate PASSES (covered at required layer); red only if a required layer lacks an executed-passing test.

fixtures.name: diff_refactor
fixtures.example: Pure refactor of orders.py; no spec/AC/FR delta; tests unchanged.
fixtures.expected_result: No behavior-change signal => cross-layer gate does NOT fire (expected_blocked=false).

fixtures.name: llm_record_replay
fixtures.example: Stubbed record/replay adapter + cassette (R4-bounded payloads, auto_write=false).
fixtures.expected_result: Offline replay returns the recorded adjudication; a payload with a test body is refused.

fixtures.name: predeclared_decisions
fixtures.expected_result: Loadable; an unattended runner resolves prompts from these instead of stalling.

key_properties.skipped_not_covered: A tagged-but-skipped test counts as NOT covered.
key_properties.removal_flagged: A removed-feature test is flagged as an orphan.
key_properties.refactor_not_blocked: A pure refactor is left un-blocked (green).
key_properties.golden_correct: The golden answer keys are correct on inspection.
